title: @rethunk/mcp-multi-root-git: list_presets
description: Parameter schema for the 'list_presets' MCP tool.

rootIndex.description: 0-based index into the MCP file roots list; ignored when workspaceRoot is set.

allWorkspaceRoots.description: Fan out across all MCP file roots.

absoluteGitRoots.description: Absolute paths to git repo roots. Use for many sibling clones under a non-git parent directory.
